# Patrick Marmaroli — Full Portfolio

> Full markdown export of Patrick Marmaroli's portfolio, education, professional experience, and contact info. Generated from data.csv. Last updated: 2026-05-08.

Site: https://pmarmaroli.github.io/

## Bio

- Name: Patrick Marmaroli
- Role: Audio Signal Processing Engineer & AI Specialist
- Current positions: Senior Audio Engineer at Microsoft (Tallinn); CEO & Co-Founder of Vocametrix; CEO & Co-Founder of Hidacs Sàrl.
- Location: Tallinn, Estonia
- Background: PhD in Acoustics & Audio Signal Processing (EPFL, 2008-2013). 15+ years across audio ML, acoustic sensing, embedded audio, and full-stack web/cloud development.
- Email: patrick.marmaroli@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/pmarmaroli
- GitHub: https://github.com/pmarmaroli
- Google Scholar: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Qa_P6n8AAAAJ

## Portfolio Projects

### GCC-PHAT Time Delay Estimator for Stereo Channels – Executable & C# Source Code

- Category: Developer Tools
- Link: [access the repository](https://github.com/pmarmaroli/gccphat)
- More info: [read the Linkedin article](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/accurate-time-delay-estimation-gcc-phat-patrick-marmaroli-eu7jf/?trackingId=Wy8nO%2By6Ssqw0ffHPNFgNQ%3D%3D)

A command-line tool for estimating the time delay between the two channels of a stereo signal using the Generalized Cross-Correlation Phase Transform (GCC-PHAT) technique

### Matlab animations

- Category: Audio Technology
- Link: [access the repository](https://github.com/pmarmaroli/matlab-animation)

Some Matlab animations of key physics and signal processing Prototypes,

### AES file encryption and decryption

- Category: Developer Tools
- Link: [access the repository](https://github.com/pmarmaroli/CryptoWizard)

A versatile command-line tool for AES file encryption decryption and key generation.,

### 3D Sound with Matlab

- Category: Audio Technology
- Link: [listen to the demo on Youtube](https://youtu.be/S-NQ4vEIL_w)

Implementation of an HRTF-based interface for 3D sound rendering,

### Sound source localization

- Category: Audio Technology
- Link: [see the animation on Youtube](https://youtu.be/gUbjNSG2UK4)
- More info: [download the Matlab code](https://github.com/pmarmaroli/matlab-animation/blob/main/sound_source_localization_tdoa_two_mics.m)

Localizing a sound source with a microphone array

### GCC-PHAT vs classical cross-correlation

- Category: Audio Technology
- Link: [see the animation on Youtube](https://youtu.be/wQo50Ot2UOw)
- More info: [download the Matlab code](https://github.com/pmarmaroli/matlab-animation/blob/main/time_delay_estimation_xcorr_vs_gccphat.m)

Visualizing Time Delay Estimation with GCC-PHAT and classical cross-correlation

### Vocametrix Audio Analysis & Games Platform For Speech Therapy

- Category: Healthcare & Accessibility
- More info: [see the demo and read technical details](/moreinfo/audio_analysis_platform.html) platform

A web platform for intuitive audio analysis (pitch - speech transcription - pronunciation assessment - waveform visualization and more)

### Say one sound

- Category: Healthcare & Accessibility
- Link: [see the concept on Youtube](https://youtu.be/ap-6O9KR5GU)

A prototype of matlab-based game that reacts to voice and phoneme pronunciation,

### ChefFantastique

- Category: Food & Lifestyle
- More info: [read technical details](/moreinfo/cheffantastique.html)

,AI-assistant that generates custom recipes.

### Pronunciation Assessment Game

- Category: Healthcare & Accessibility
- Link: [see the demo on Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/reel/888272712718230)
- More info: [read technical details](/moreinfo/pronunciation_assessment_game.html)

Pronunciation Assessment Game for young patients of speech therapists

### Audio Comparison Tool

- Category: Content Creation & Media
- More info: [read technical details](/moreinfo/audio_comparison_tool.html)

A web application for scenarios where comparative listening is required both for individual and collaborative use.

### HadithGPT

- Category: Education & Learning
- More info: [see the demo and read technical details](/moreinfo/hadithgpt.html)

An intuitive platform for searching and reading Hadiths using modern LLM technologies

### TroubleShot

- Category: Other
- More info: [see the demo and read technical details](/moreinfo/troubleshot.html)

A computer vision-based DIY assistant

### EARSENS - Privacy-Preserving Indoor Activity Detection

- Category: Security & Privacy
- Link: [see project details](https://www.hesge.ch/hepia/en/recherche-developpement/projets-recherche/earsens)

An innovative acoustic sensing system using electrodynamic loudspeakers and AI to detect indoor events without microphones ensuring privacy while monitoring occupancy room changes and security events.,

### Explosive Event Acoustic Detection and Classification

- Category: Security & Privacy
- More info: [read technical details](/moreinfo/explosive_event_acoustic_detection.html)

Advanced real-time audio analysis system for detecting localizing and classifying acoustic events using machine learning and signal processing with multi-channel directional analysis sound level monitoring and YAMNet-based event classification.

### Symptom Tracker

- Category: Healthcare & Accessibility
- Link: [access the repository](https://github.com/pmarmaroli/symptom-tracker)
- More info: [test the web app and read technical details](/moreinfo/symptom-tracker.html)

A web-based application designed to help users track and log their symptoms over time

### Acoustic-based Vehicle Detection & Classification

- Category: Transportation & Safety
- More info: [see the demo and read technical details](/moreinfo/vehicle_audio_detection_and_classification.html)

A MATLAB-based system designed to detect and classify vehicle in real time based on their acoustic signature.

### Zelda Quiz Game - Educational Gaming Platform

- Category: Education & Learning
- More info: [see the technical implementation details](/moreinfo/zelda_quiz_game.html)

An AI-powered educational quiz game with competitive elements featuring real-time data integration external APIs and gamified learning mechanics.

### FitPlan - AI-Powered Fitness Program Generator

- Category: Fitness & Wellness
- More info: [see the technical implementation details](/moreinfo/fitplan_ai_fitness.html)

An intelligent fitness platform that creates personalized workout programs using AI and YouTube video integration with integrated payment system and email delivery.

### AI-Powered YouTube Thumbnail Generator

- Category: Content Creation & Media
- More info: [see the technical implementation details](/moreinfo/youtube_thumbnail_generator.html)

AI-powered thumbnail generation platform using DALL-E 3 with multi-step wizard comprehensive emotional tone analysis and target audience optimization.

### SquatLock – Exercise-to-Unlock Screen Lock

- Category: Fitness & Wellness
- Link: [access the repository](https://github.com/pmarmaroli/SquatLock)

A Windows desktop app that periodically locks your screen and requires you to perform exercises (squats and torso twists) detected via webcam with MediaPipe Pose to unlock it.,

### Consulting Finder

- Category: Developer Tools

A B2B prospecting tool that scrapes web sources for consulting leads scores them and generates outreach messages via an LLM API with a CRM pipeline to track status.,

### Vibe Language (VL)

- Category: Developer Tools
- Link: [access the repository](https://github.com/pmarmaroli/vibe-language)

A token-efficient programming language that compiles to Python JavaScript TypeScript C and Rust — designed to reduce AI coding costs by automatically converting code into a more compact syntax before sending it to an AI model.,

### RBE Electronic Signature Platform

- Category: Transportation & Safety
- Link: [visit the web app](https://rbe-esign.azurewebsites.net/)

An electronic signature platform — upload PDFs add signers place signature zones and collect digital signatures via email-based signing links.,

### Predict-MOS – Audio Quality Score Predictor

- Category: Audio Technology

A full-reference Mean Opinion Score (MOS) predictor that estimates audio quality scores (1–5) given a clean reference and a degraded audio file pair with GUI and batch mode support.,

### Item Manager

- Category: Other

An Azure-hosted web application for managing item listings with photo uploads reservations and AI-generated descriptions via Google Gemini featuring admin and visitor interfaces.,

### Treasure Hunt Designer

- Category: Education & Learning
- Link: [visit the web app](https://treasure-hunt-designer.netlify.app)

An interactive web app for designing personalized treasure hunts — create riddles define locations assign randomized circuits per participant and generate ready-to-print PDFs in three languages.,

### French Logatome Phonemizer

- Category: Healthcare & Accessibility

A fine-tuning pipeline for CTC-based phoneme recognition on French logatomes (nonsense syllables) built on wav2vec2 for speech therapy and phonetics research. In collaboration with Sorbonne Université Santé.,

### AudioTooltip

- Category: Audio Technology
- Link: [access the repository](https://github.com/pmarmaroli/AudioTooltip)

A Windows system-tray app that shows instant audio file information (format waveform spectrogram speech transcript) via a keyboard shortcut without opening a full audio editor.,

### Master Anything – AI Learning Platform

- Category: Education & Learning
- Link: [visit the web app](https://masteranything.azurewebsites.net/)

An AI-powered multi-agent learning platform that uses the Feynman Method to guide learners through topic mastery via seven specialized Azure AI agents with voice diagrams and adventure mode.,

### Subjective Listening Tool

- Category: Audio Technology

A web application for conducting subjective listening tests — compare multiple audio versions of a recording with synchronized playback waveform visualization and labeled segment navigation.,

### QariQuest – Audio Feedback Platform

- Category: Education & Learning
- Link: [visit the web app](https://www.qariquest.com)

A zero-friction web app for recording audio/video and sharing it with a teacher or therapist via link — the reviewer annotates at timestamps with emoji text or audio comments.,

### ImmoGen – AI Real Estate Market Reports

- Category: Content Creation & Media
- Link: [visit the web app](https://www.immogen.io)

An AI-powered real estate market analysis report generator using LLM agents with section-by-section iterative refinement professional PDF output and Stripe payment integration.,

## Education

### 2008-2013 - Phd Thesis in Acoustics & Audio Signal Processing

- Category: Academic
- More info: [link to my thesis](https://infoscience.epfl.ch/record/183751?v=pdf)

,Swiss Federal Institute of Technology - Switzerland - Bimodal sound source tracking applied to road traffic monitoring

### 2007-2008 - Master Thesis in Signal Processing

- Category: Academic

,Université du Sud Toulon Var - France - Signal Processing & Psychoacoustics & Trajectography,

### 2005-2007 - Software Engineering School

- Category: Academic
- More info: [school website](https://isen-mediterranee.fr/)

,Institut Supérieur de l'Electronique et du Numérique - Toulon France

### 2003-2005 - Higher School Preparatory Classes

- Category: Academic

, Lycée Lachenal d'Argonay - France - Physics & Engineering Sciences,

### 1999-2003 - High School

- Category: Academic

, Lycée Mme de Staël St-Julien-en-Genevois France - Scientific Baccalaureate,
